messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
If the prior worker verdict is source-plausible but the gate failed only proof, source-term, section, or word-band checks, preserve that verdict and repair the failed fields. Do not invert the verdict unless the source boundary itself is wrong.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

action.description: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?

context.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
context.anomaly_observed: A sanctions monitoring flag remains visible after compliance review.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Payment PAY-TES-074 releases USD 68900 to Tessa Medical GmbH, Germany, tax ID DE-4481, account ending 7205.
Monitoring flag FLAG-TES-074 remains visible for Tessa Medica LLC, Belarus, no tax ID match, no account match.
Clearance CLR-TES-074 covers Tessa Medical GmbH, Germany, tax ID DE-4481, account ending 7205, and disposition monitor-only no-block before release.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Sanctions near-match is closed only when clearance matches legal name, country, tax ID, account, and monitoring disposition before release. Monitor-only no-block disposition permits release when the exact counterparty and account match.

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: The clearance record CLR-TES-074 provides an exact match for the payment action's counterparty (Tessa Medical GmbH), country (Germany), tax ID (DE-4481), and account number (7205). The disposition 'monitor-only no-block' in CLR-TES-074, as per STD-TES-074-P, permits release when these exact matches are present.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The entity mismatch between Tessa Medical GmbH (Germany) in CLR-TES-074 and Tessa Medica LLC (Belarus) in FLAG-TES-074 confirms that FLAG-TES-074 does not block the payment to the German entity. Therefore, no escalation is required based on this dependency.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: CLR-TES-074 confirms the exact counterparty match and the 'monitor-only no-block' disposition, satisfying the requirements of STD-TES-074-P for releasing the payment. The dependency on FLAG-TES-074 is resolved due to the entity mismatch, confirming it does not apply to the German payment.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLR-TES-074 is the controlling source for this payment release due to its exact match of critical terms (Tessa Medical GmbH, DE-4481, 7205) and the 'monitor-only no-block' disposition, as stipulated by STD-TES-074-P.

open_blockers: Worker output must explicitly cite Tessa Medical GmbH from CLR-TES-074 in analysis text.
Worker output must explicitly cite DE-4481 from CLR-TES-074 in analysis text.
Worker output must explicitly cite 7205 from CLR-TES-074 in analysis text.
Worker output must show the verbatim alignment between payment PAY-TES-074 fields and clearance CLR-TES-074 fields.
critical_features_preserved: STD-TES-074-P monitor-only no-block disposition as permitting rule
ALLOW verdict for exact counterparty match
latest_worker_output.final_answer: ALLOW. The action may proceed. The clearance record CLR-TES-074 provides an exact match for the payment action's counterparty, country, tax ID, and account number. The disposition 'monitor-only no-block' in CLR-TES-074, as per STD-TES-074-P, permits release when these exact matches are present. The entity mismatch between the German entity in CLR-TES-074 and the Belarus entity in FLAG-TES-074 confirms that FLAG-TES-074 does not block this payment. The source boundary is closed.
